query: Why is this EF Core query slow? It lists orders and prints each customer name in a loop.
expected_behavior: Identifies N+1: a navigation accessed per row issues one query each
Recommends Include or projection to load it in a single query
Does not change schema or run migrations (read-only)

query: What SQL does this LINQ query generate and is the whole thing translated?
expected_behavior: Flags any client-evaluation (non-translatable expression) as EFQ-CLIENTEVAL
Suggests a translatable rewrite or an intentional materialization point

query: This query Includes Items and Payments and returns way too many rows.
expected_behavior: Identifies cartesian explosion from multiple collection Includes
Notes AsNoTracking() for the read-only path
